name: M249 | 淹没
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. It has been custom painted using teal-colored desert camouflage and environments as inspiration. \"WE'VE BEEN SET UP! THEY'RE EVERYWHERE!\"
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 这把武器以青色的沙漠伪装和环境为灵感进行了自定义涂装。 “我们被算计了！他们布下了天罗地网！”
